parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, max_tokens: 100, messages: [ { role:'user', content: [ { type:'text', text:'Describe what this image shows in one short sentence, focused on anything relevant to an insurance enquiry.' }, { type:'image_url', image_url: { url: $json.mediaUrl } } ] } ] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const c = $('Code · State').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...c, userText: c.text || (c.mediaType === 'voice' ? '(sent a voice note)' : '') } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: 'Sure 🙏 connecting you to our advisor now. Someone will be with you shortly.', message_type: 'outgoing', private: false }) }}

parameters.url: ={{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.chatwoot_base }}/api/v1/accounts/{{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.chatwoot_account_id }}/conversations/{{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.convId }}/labels

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ Id: $('Code · Prep lead').first().json.client_id, last_seen: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const c = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { stage: c.stage || 'new', userText: c.userText || '', model: c.model || 'google/gemini-2.5-flash' } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Code · FAQ prep').first().json.model || 'google/gemini-2.5-flash', max_tokens: 300, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Code · FAQ prep').first().json._systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $('Code · FAQ prep').first().json.userText } ] }) }}
